changes: Fixed an issue where content could be visible above the sticky header when scrolling.
Fixed issue where the navigation menu couldn't be fully viewed on short screens.
Fixed a bug causing the menu button to toggle inconsistently.
Prevented large text blocks from sticking to the top and obscuring the page.
Updated homepage subject text to better reflect the tool's purpose.
Standardized sticky headers across all pages to prevent content overlap.
Mobile navigation redesign with FAB menu.
Created the dedicated changelog page to view update history.
Dynamically display the current version in the header of all pages.
Added a Changelog link to the footer across the site.
Added a dedicated changelog page to track website updates.
Improved the design of the footer.
Initial launch of the Barking Stink incident reporting tool.
